title: Flag row component for displaying flag details and actions
purpose: Displays a single flag entry in a list with topic, comment, status, dates, and action controls. Used in flag management interfaces.
module_context: Exports a React functional component FlagRow that accepts flag data and action handlers as props. Includes helper functions for status formatting and date formatting.

steps.content: Determine the CSS class names for a badge based on the flag status.
Return specific color classes for open, addressed, resolved, and dismissed statuses.
Return default gray classes for any unrecognized status.
Convert the first character of the status to uppercase.
Parse the input date string into a JavaScript Date object.
Format the date using the user's locale with short month, numeric day, and numeric year.
Render a table row containing flag details.
Display the topic name as a clickable button that navigates to the topic.
Show the flag comment with optional dismissed reason below.
Display the flag status in a colored badge with appropriate styling.
Show the creation date formatted in a readable way.
Include action controls for resolving, dismissing, or reopening the flag.
